name: CFSC Checks Cashed Ogden
description_short: CFSC at 1034 Ogden Ave is a check-cashing and financial services location in the Bronx offering check cashing, money orders, prepaid cards, and bill payment services.
description_long:
Community Financial Services Company (CFSC) operates a network of check-cashing and financial services locations across New York City, with the Ogden Avenue location serving the Bronx community. This specific branch is positioned as a full-service alternative financial services provider catering to underbanked and unbanked residents who need quick access to cash and financial tools without traditional banking relationships.

The Ogden Ave location offers a comprehensive suite of services beyond basic check cashing, including money orders, prepaid debit cards, electronic bill pay, foreign currency exchange, money transfers, tax refund services, prepaid cellular services, lottery services, EZ Pass, MetroCard sales, coin exchange, and ATM access. This breadth of offerings positions CFSC as a one-stop shop for customers managing multiple financial errands.

What distinguishes this location is its extended hours (open as early as 8 AM and as late as 8:15 PM on weekdays, with weekend service), Spanish-language support (Se Habla Español), and integration within CFSC's larger network of 20+ locations across the Bronx and Manhattan, allowing customers flexibility to conduct transactions at multiple branches. The company targets working-class and immigrant communities who value convenience and accessibility over traditional banking.

However, check-cashing services historically carry higher fees than bank accounts, and while the website lists extensive services, it provides no pricing transparency. Additionally, prepaid cards and money orders come with their own fee structures that may not be competitive with bank alternatives. The company's reliance on cash-based transactions also means customers are exposed to carrying large amounts of physical currency.
pros: Extended hours: Open until 8:15 PM weekdays and 6:15 PM Saturdays for working customers
Bilingual service with Spanish-language support available
20+ locations across Bronx and Manhattan for transaction flexibility
Comprehensive service menu including check cashing, money orders, bill pay, and prepaid cards in one location
Weekend service on Sunday (9 AM - 4:15 PM) for customers unable to visit during weekdays
Additional convenience services including lottery, MetroCard, EZ Pass, and coin exchange
Foreign currency exchange available for international customers
cons: No pricing information provided on website—check-cashing fees and service charges are opaque
Prepaid debit cards typically come with recurring monthly fees and transaction limits
Cash-based transactions expose customers to security risk of carrying large amounts of currency
No indication of competitive rates compared to banks or credit unions for services like money transfers
Limited accountability information—no parent company details, licensing verification, or customer complaint history disclosed
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked workers who receive paychecks and need immediate cash access
Immigrant and multilingual communities requiring Spanish-language financial services
Customers managing multiple financial errands (bill pay, money orders, prepaid services) in one location
Shift workers needing financial services during extended evening and weekend hours
diagnosis: CFSC Ogden Ave is best for working-class and immigrant customers in the Bronx who need fast, convenient access to check cashing and multiple financial services outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that all fees are undisclosed on the website, and check-cashing services typically carry higher costs than bank alternatives—customers should request detailed pricing before using services.
